Alert · the risk signal

Hot magenta. Carries every "outside the boundary" signal — blocked egress, audit failure, third-party LLM call, banned vocabulary. Replaces v2 worm-red so the pair stays native to the Static palette and stays distinct from the brand-reds buyers already see on their regulator dashboards.

Alert 700#C71A4D
Alert 600#E62A5F
Alert 500#FF3366
Alert 400#FF6688
Alert 300#FF99AA
Alert 100#FFE0E8
×
Outside the boundary External LLM APIs · public cloud AI · third-party model training
